meaning: adj.有翼的,迅速的,飞行的,翼受伤的
examples: Flycatchers feed primarily on winged insects.
A glorious well-oiled angel rides on a winged unicorn.
It's some kind of gold cover and then there were two cherubim, these enormous winged lions that flanked the ark.
Meanwhile, seagulls the size of winged chihuahuas stare malevolently down from steepled sandstone spires.
That first day I spent with the first sculpture I saw, the Winged Victory of Samothrace.
